title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited:
S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited!
